_note: Copy this file to alt_config.json (it is gitignored). Tokens expire in ~5 minutes — paste fresh values before each test run.
_how_to_get_tokens: Open alt.xyz in Chrome, sign in, open DevTools → Network tab, trigger any card search, find a request to typesense or the graphql endpoint, and copy the x-typesense-api-key query param and the Authorization: Bearer <token> header value.
